name: The Technical Architect
effect: Produce a reference architecture aligning all systems, teams, and strategic intent. This card is considered authoritative.

clauses.name: DIAGRAM CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a decision requires justification: A diagram is produced that supports any conclusion.

clauses.name: LEGACY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a legacy system is incompatible with the architecture: The architecture is updated to include it.

clauses.name: CONSULTATION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If this card is challenged: The challenger is invited to a follow-up session.

witness_quote: It depends on your definition of done.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Which version of this is current?
